title: juncus uliginosus var. minor
intro: Juncus uliginosus var. minor, also known as small bulrush, is a plant species belonging to the Juncaceae family, characterized by its slender stems and small flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Juncus uliginosus var. minor include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
